title: Dish Drainer Rack, Small Dish Drainer, Expandable Dish Rack With Removable Cutlery Holder, Anti Rust Small Drying Rack for Sink, Compact Draining Board Rack For Kitchen Counter, Grey
features: 【EXTENDABLE DESIGN】This dish drainer rack is extendable to hold more items, or fold it to save space. It's suitable for different kitchen countertop surface. Dimensions: L27-49 * W19.5 * H9cm. When not in use, it can be folden up for convenient storage in a drawer

【PREMIUM QUALITY】Plate rack & handles are made of food-safe stainless steel, remains small dish drainer rust-free after long term used. Match with Made from non-BPA and high-quality plastic and non-slip rubber feet preventing surface scratching and adding stability

【COMPACT DESIGN】 This dish drying rack holds up to 9 plates, serveral glassware,cups, bowls etc. With compact design, it’s perfect for limited counter space, small kitchen, a couples, apartments or dorms

【REMOVABLE UTENSILS HOLDER】 It features a detachable 2-slot cutlery holder with drainage holes to keep your utensils dry and clean. With snap-on recessed lock at bottom, the utensils holder can stand stably even when putting more silverwares

【QUICK DRAINAGE SYSTEM】 With this kitchen drainer, plates are holded neat and upright for quick drying. Draining Board has appropriate gradient and gutters, channels water flow straightly into the sink. It’s no longer need for drying dishes tediously by hand and ease your life
